condition: deterministic-pdf-text-headings (regex profile 'eu-legislation'; no outline, no LLM)
description: Deterministic PageIndex-shaped index derived from the PDF's TEXT LAYER by a regular-heading regex profile, used because this PDF carries no usable embedded outline (fitz.get_toc() empty). Structure comes from the document's own regular numbering (e.g. CHAPTER / Section / Article), not from an LLM. Still the honest 'deterministic PDF representation' arm — the structure source is a parser rather than bookmarks.
